creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jin-Sih,

thanks for submitting this update.
However it does not work on 9-CURRENT as shown here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/9.0-FreeBSD/node-0.4.6.log

I am investigating the issue with sem_wait but if you come with a
workaround do not hesitate to send a followup.

Regards,
culot@
